no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen did not expose stable seed data
prompt: Create a production source sheet for Mine Cards stage UI and icon source family. Source family: isolated icon sheet. Role: semantic icons with gutters and transparent/chroma source. This is a cuttable source sheet, not a gameplay screenshot, mockup, landing page, or composed UI screen. Make exactly a 4x4 row-major grid on a perfectly flat solid #0000ff chroma background. Use 160px minimum outer margin and 160px minimum clear blue gutters between every visible pixel, shadow, sparkle, and component. Icons should be about 65 percent of their slot size, leaving obvious empty blue space around every icon. Each occupied slot must contain exactly one single connected chunky voxel icon silhouette, centered in its slot. Do not add loose pebbles, sparks, labels, dashed borders, separate tiny fragments, or decorative satellites around any icon. Slot 16 may be a plain empty blue slot with no visible marks. Generate these Mine Cards-specific icons in exact row-major order: activity_mining mine cart full of gray stone with a small warm lantern; activity_woodcutting blocky tree stump with axe embedded; activity_fishing tan wooden fishing dock plaque with fishing rod and silver fish, no water, no blue, no cyan; activity_smithing stone forge/anvil with warm fire; activity_combat crossed sword and shield as one connected icon; activity_farming compact crop plot with carrots and wheat on a connected base; activity_bank small stone bank chest/vault building with coin emblem; activity_shop wooden market stall with coin sign and lantern; resource_stone single chunky gray stone boulder with no loose pebbles; resource_copper_ore single chunky brown rock with copper chunks and no loose pebbles; resource_coin single connected coin stack cluster; upgrade_pickaxe stone pickaxe with warm highlight and no glow particles; state_locked chunky padlock; state_equipped backpack or equipment chest; state_ready green check marker on a small wooden plaque as one connected icon; empty blue slot for spacing test with no dashed outline. Use chunky voxel-idle style, warm mine lighting, original silhouettes, readable at 24-48px runtime size. Do not use #0000ff, blue, cyan, magenta, purple, or pink inside any icon. Keep all labels, numbers, quest text, counters, and state values blank for runtime composition. Use consistent perspective, lighting, material language, and line weight across the sheet.
negative_prompt: button labels, resource counters, timer values, tutorial text, debug text, game state values, random letters, watermarks, labels fused into reusable backgrounds, icons fused into buttons, wrong subject, weak silhouette at gameplay size, opaque chroma-key background, baked board state, readable text, fake letters, watermark, fused icons inside buttons, cropped silhouettes, merged components, busy stretch centers, non-flat chroma background, purple or red-blue halo on transparent edges
rejected_candidate_notes: Candidates A-D rejected for component merge/gutter/key-color/source-intake failures; E raw required alpha cleanup, E-alpha passed source-sheet intake and semantic/style audit for first runtime icon proof.
